title: Elastic N.V. (ESTC) Analyst Ratings, Estimates & Forecasts
text: Elastic N.V. (ESTC) - Analyst Ratings, Estimates and Forecasts. Analyst Consensus: 23 analysts covering ESTC. Consensus rating: Buy. 35% Strong Buy, 39% Buy, 26% Hold. Average price target: $102-107. High price target: $130. Low price target: $75. Earnings Estimates: Current fiscal year EPS estimates: $2.50-$2.54 (non-GAAP). Next quarter EPS estimate: $0.64. Revenue estimates FY2026: $1.734-$1.736 billion. Revenue estimate next quarter: $445-447 million. Growth Expectations: Revenue growth expected at 17% for full year. Subscription revenue growth expected at 20% for full year. Earnings growth significantly exceeding revenue growth. Key Drivers Cited by Analysts: AI adoption acceleration as major upside catalyst. Platform consolidation in security and observability. Large deal momentum with enterprise customers. Cloud revenue acceleration. Analyst Sentiment: Overall constructive despite recent share price weakness. AI opportunity cited as primary bull case. Cloud transition supporting margin expansion. Vector database capabilities providing competitive moat. Risks Cited: Macro uncertainty and growth deceleration. Competition from OpenSearch and purpose-built solutions. Public sector spending pressure.
